name: Spooktacular Choc Cupcakes w/ Creamy Peanut B
recipeInstructions:
- Preheat oven to 350°F. Line muffin cups (2 ½-inch diameter) with paper baking cups.
- To make the filling: Beat cream cheese and peanut butter in a large bowl until blended. Add milk and vanilla; beat well. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating until smooth. Add additional milk, 1 teaspoon at a time, until desired consistency is reached.
- To make the cupcakes: Stir together dry ingredients (2 cups all-purpose flour, 2 cups sugar, ¾ cup cocoa, ½ teaspoon baking soda, ½ teaspoon salt) in a large bowl. Add shortening, buttermilk or water (or 2½ teaspoons white vinegar plus enough milk to make ¾ cup), eggs, and vanilla. Beat on low speed with an electric mixer for 30 seconds, scraping the bowl occasionally.
- Fill muffin cups about halfway full with batter.
- Bake in a 350°F oven for 20 minutes. Remove from the wire rack.
- Let cool completely.
- Place peanut butter cream filling into a pastry bag fitted with a large star tip. Insert the tip into the center of each cupcake; pipe filling onto the cake. Remove the tip and garnish the top with swirls or extra filling. Decorate with candies, if desired.
- Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
